title: palicourea bracteosa
intro: Palicourea bracteosa, also known as the white panama or white angel wings, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its leaves and stems are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Palicourea bracteosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and its leaves can be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
